text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What's going on? What's with my running?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
choice_data_list: First of all, you need to recharge.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: There's no point in carelessly overexerting myself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Sorry. I wasn't at my best there.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Let's get back to it tomorrow. I'm counting on
you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I've felt regret plenty of times up till now.
choice_data_list: That's why I'm here. For times like this.
That's why I'm here. For times like this.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Okay then, race strategist. Tell me our next
move.
